1.Title: Disco Demon
1.Description: The equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by <color=#2BAD00>90</color>. When the equipper's <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color> deals <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color>, all squad members' DMG dealt increases by <color=#2BAD00>15%</color> for 40s, stacking up to 2 times. This effect can trigger once per use of a skill and repeated triggers reset the duration. With 2 stacks, the equipper's Anomaly Proficiency increases by an additional <color=#2BAD00>60</color>. Only one instance of this effect can exist in the same squad.
